proposal.proposed_content:
## Preferred Working Hours

Synthetic preference: focus blocks in the morning, syncs after 13:00.
proposal.rationale: The synthetic working-hours preference changed and only this one section needs replacing, not the full file.
proposal.source_context_summary: A synthetic planning session confirmed a new preferred working-hours pattern.
proposal.reason_this_is_durable: Working-hour preferences are stable context reused across sessions.
